title: Section 16
content: Where, by any 1[Central Act] or Regulation, a power to make any appointment is conferred, then, unless a different intention appears, the authority having 2[for the time being] power to make the appointment shall also have power to suspend or dismiss any person appointed 3[whether by itself or any other authority] in exercise of that power.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1937, for "Act of the Governor General in Council". 2. Ins. by Act 18 of 1928, s. 2 and the First Schedule. 3. Subs. by Act 18 of 1928, s. 2 and the First Schedule, for "by it".
